treatments.Healthy: Plant is healthy! Continue regular watering and monitoring.
treatments.Tomato_Early_Blight: Apply fungicide containing chlorothalonil or copper. Remove infected leaves. Improve air circulation. Avoid overhead watering.
treatments.Tomato_Late_Blight: Apply fungicide immediately. Remove infected plants to prevent spread. Avoid overhead watering. Destroy heavily infected plants.
treatments.Tomato_Leaf_Mold: Apply fungicide containing copper or sulfur. Reduce humidity around plants. Remove infected leaves. Improve air circulation.
treatments.Potato_Early_Blight: Apply fungicide (mancozeb or chlorothalonil). Remove infected foliage. Practice crop rotation. Use resistant varieties.
treatments.Potato_Late_Blight: Apply fungicide immediately (metalaxyl or mancozeb). Destroy infected plants. Use resistant varieties. Practice crop rotation.
